nasb.text: There will be no work for Egypt Which its head or tail, its palm branch or bulrush, may do.

esv.text: And there will be nothing for Egypt that head or tail, palm branch or reed, may do.

cnv.text: 無論是頭或尾、棕枝或蘆葦所作的， 都不能為埃及成就甚麼事。

ccb.text: 埃及从首领到平民， 从权贵到草根必一筹莫展。

csbs.text: 无论是头是尾，是棕枝是芦苇， 都不能为埃及成就什么。
